name: terroiros-shield-docs
description: Documentation and specification foundation for Terroir Shield

scripts.validate:schemas: ajv validate -c ajv-formats -s spec/schemas/climate-event.schema.json -d spec/examples/climate-event.sample.json --spec=draft2020 && ajv validate -c ajv-formats -s spec/schemas/payout-decision.schema.json -d spec/examples/payout-decision.sample.json --spec=draft2020
scripts.validate: npm run lint:md && npm run lint:links && npm run lint:openapi && npm run validate:schemas
